title: Miss Kobayashi's Dragon Maid Custom GUI Pack
description: Miss Kobayashi's Dragon Maid Custom GUI Pack
body: **![Miss Kobayashi's Dragon Maid GUI Pack](https://i.imgur.com/Th3IY62.png)** **Introduction:** This is a GUI-only resource pack inspired by the anime "Miss Kobayashi's Dragon Maid." It can be used with other resource packs by placing it on top. I’ve customized various GUI elements, including the hot bar, with a blue and pink color palette to suit the theme. If you'd prefer other colors like gray and white, feel free to let me know for future updates! **If you found any bugs please report to me I will fix it as soon as I can.** [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) **Feature Highlights:** - **Hud:** ![Hud](https://i.imgur.com/oE04Pf5.png) - **Settings:** ![Settings](https://i.imgur.com/Vhupm96.png) - **Inventory:** ![Inventory](https://i.imgur.com/lujRWD7.png) - **Creative Menu:** ![Creative Menu](https://i.imgur.com/t8tzxTS.png) - **Anvil:** ![Anvil](https://i.imgur.com/Zi4oH0a.png) - **Chest:** ![Chest](https://i.imgur.com/kFiCLPg.png) - **Cartography Table:** ![Cartography Table](https://i.imgur.com/zBIpX4B.png) - **Loom:** ![Loom](https://i.imgur.com/baKa0Uy.png) - **Brewing Stand:** ![Brewing Stand](https://i.imgur.com/QQhE83K.png) - **Beacon Menu:** ![Beacon Menu](https://i.imgur.com/PPWiBII.png) - **Villager Trading Menu:** ![Villager Trading Menu](https://i.imgur.com/AfNyR7S.png) **Additional Resources:** - Explore more packs on [ListarMC](https://listarmc.com/) - Join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph) to suggest new packs, vote on upcoming designs, and participate in anime discussions. **Thank you for your support! ❤️**
